title: endiusa hirsuta
side_effects: Endiusa hirsuta can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, gastrointestinal issues, and skin irritation. In severe cases, overconsumption of the plant can lead to liver damage, kidney problems, and respiratory failure. Prolonged exposure to its extracts has also been linked to headaches, dizziness, and even seizures in some individuals. Additionally, improper handling of the plant can cause skin burns, eye irritation, and other adverse reactions.
